channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-07
item.description:
It's been an exciting time in our open-source research community, with notable progress made in both the `scienceverse/metacheck` and `JamieCummins/regcheck` projects. In `metacheck`, the `data_check` branch saw significant improvements to its caching mechanism, data handling, and folder management, laying the groundwork for more efficient data storage and retrieval. Meanwhile, `regcheck` made strides in its `staging` branch, updating the default OpenAI model and refining backend handling of insufficient evidence, alongside aesthetic bug fixes. These updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, as both focus on enhancing data management and processing capabilities. The community's efforts to refine these tools will ultimately contribute to more robust and reliable research outcomes, and we celebrate the dedication and collaboration that drives our community forward. As these projects continue to evolve, we can expect even more innovative solutions to emerge, further solidifying our community's position at the forefront of open-source research.

63 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck27 commits
metacheck19 commits
regcheck10 commits
escicheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was worked on, where the cache was improved, the original data is now kept, and hardcoded folders were made better. The commit on the `data_check` branch specifically aimed to enhance the caching mechanism and retain the original data. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The changes were focused on refining how data is handled and stored within the `data_check` branch. The hardcoded folders were also revised for better functionality, as stated in the commit message.

1 commit(s) today:

  • c799dcf [data_check] improve cache, keep original data, better hardcoded folders — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where "admin updates" were made, as stated in the commit message. The branch `feature-non-apa-newer` was then merged from https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into itself, as indicated by the merge commit. No new features or modules were added in these commits, only administrative changes were made. The merge commit and the admin update commit are the only changes made in this set of commits.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
